cross_scene_arcs.title: From Survival to Purpose: The Emergence of Accountability
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne evolves from a fugitive driven by raw survival instinct into an agent of deliberate purpose, shifting from evasion to actively confronting the systems that created him. His goal transforms from escaping capture to uncovering the truth, exposing Blackbriar, and ultimately choosing personal closure over institutional reckoning.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne is gravely injured and focused solely on survival, with no awareness of his past or mission.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne achieves his objective by securing and transferring classified evidence, choosing to end his story on his own terms rather than seeking redemption through the system.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The long-term consequences of exposing Blackbriar and Bourne's ultimate fate remain unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Confronting the Past: The Psychological Reckoning with Identity
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne experiences a cascading psychological confrontation with repressed memories of his recruitment, violent past, and role in Marie's death. This internal conflict culminates in the full realization that he voluntarily became Jason Bourne, leading to a crisis of identity and moral agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne begins to experience fragmented, traumatic flashbacks without understanding their origin or significance.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne fully accepts his past as David Webb and rejects the program's control, declaring his intent to end both the program and his identity as Jason Bourne.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional and existential aftermath of this acceptance—and whether he can truly escape his conditioning—remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Burden of Connection: Reckoning with Personal Loss and Trust
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne moves from isolation toward fragile human connections, confronting the emotional consequences of his life on the run. His relationships with Marie's brother, Ross, and Nicky reflect a growing capacity for empathy, protection, and emotional vulnerability, marking a shift from detachment to connection.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne seeks out Marie's brother to face the personal cost of his actions, initiating emotional accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne shares a moment of emotional honesty with Nicky, offering reassurance and demonstrating his own healing, suggesting he is no longer defined solely by trauma.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The safety and future of those he connects with—especially Nicky—remain uncertain, underscoring the fragility of trust in his world.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Turning the Hunt: From Prey to Tactical Controller
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne transitions from being hunted to actively manipulating the surveillance apparatus against itself. By infiltrating comms, directing Ross, and controlling environments, he reasserts dominance over his pursuers, shifting his status from fugitive to strategic operator.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne is evading detection, reacting to threats with survival-based tactics.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne commands the operational environment, using real-time intelligence and crowd dynamics to outmaneuver agents and maintain control—until Ross's disobedience disrupts the plan.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Despite tactical superiority, Bourne remains vulnerable to unpredictable human behavior and unseen threats, limiting his control.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Chain of Truth: Uncovering Blackbriar and Ending the Program
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bourne's pursuit of truth evolves from fragmented clues to a focused mission to dismantle the Blackbriar program. This arc combines external conflict (tracking operatives, breaching secure facilities), internal struggle (accepting responsibility), and relational stakes (protecting Nicky, trusting Landy) into a cohesive drive toward systemic exposure and personal closure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne learns the term 'Blackbriar' and realizes it is tied to his own origins, marking the beginning of a targeted investigation.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne secures the evidence, transfers it to Landy, and confronts Hirsch about his creation—symbolically rejecting the program and his assassin identity.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The program's full dismantling and Bourne's survival after entering the hospital remain uncertain, leaving the final resolution open-ended.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Skeptic to Believer: Reopening the Bourne Case
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landy transitions from resisting involvement in the Bourne investigation to actively leading it, driven by new evidence and her evolving understanding of the case. Initially skeptical and morally opposed to reopening the file, she gradually takes command of surveillance operations and redefines the investigative approach.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Landy aims to maintain distance from the Bourne case and uphold her belief that he was wrongfully pursued.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She publicly contradicts Vosen, asserting her own theory about Bourne's connections and shifting from containment to truth-seeking.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The power struggle with Vosen and the authenticity of the evidence against Bourne remain uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Moral Awakening and Institutional Rebellion
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landy's growing ethical opposition to Blackbriar's extrajudicial protocols escalates into open defiance of Vosen's authority, culminating in her decision to expose the program. This arc traces her transformation from a loyal officer to a moral dissenter confronting systemic illegality.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Landy discovers the unauthorized lethal action protocol and challenges its legality.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She accepts incriminating evidence from Bourne and confirms Blackbriar's assassinations of U.S. citizens, committing fully to exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to safely expose the program without being silenced or discredited remains unresolved.

cross_scene_arcs.title: From Pursuer to Ally: The Landy-Bourne Alliance
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landy's relationship with Bourne evolves from detached investigator to trusted confidante and collaborator. Through direct contact, mutual disclosure, and strategic alignment, she shifts from hunting him to protecting and empowering him.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Bourne initiates contact, transforming Landy from observer to participant.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Landy reveals Bourne's true identity as David Webb and opens a channel of cooperation rather than confrontation.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Bourne will fully trust or accept Landy's overture remains uncertain.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Burden of Truth: Confronting Treadstone's Legacy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landy undertakes a solitary journey of documentation and revelation, piecing together the hidden history of Treadstone and confronting its human cost. This arc blends personal introspection, institutional critique, and investigative pursuit as she becomes the moral custodian of the truth.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Landy begins documenting Bourne's operations, shifting from pursuit to accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She uncovers evidence linking Bourne to Treadstone's origins and a deliberate cover-up, fully grasping the program's ethical failures.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The emotional and moral weight of this knowledge remains hers alone, with no clear path to redemption.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Whistleblower's Gambit: Exposing Blackbriar
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Landy executes a decisive plan to expose Blackbriar by transmitting classified documents, transitioning from covert resistance to public accountability. This arc captures the climax of her moral and operational break from the agency.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Landy initiates the fax transmission of the Blackbriar file, risking interception to ensure exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: She delivers a final warning to Vosen and walks away, having successfully leaked the evidence and achieved her objective.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Her long-term safety and career consequences remain uncertain as she exits under implied threat.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Escalation of Control: From Surveillance to Lethal Force
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vosen's objective evolves from identifying a leak to full operational dominance through surveillance, then shifts decisively toward lethal elimination of perceived threats, culminating in the authorization of deadly force against Bourne.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Uncover and neutralize the unknown source who leaked Blackbriar information to Simon Ross.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Bourne is now a target for elimination, reflecting Vosen's prioritization of mission security over intelligence extraction.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The ethical and strategic consequences of using lethal force instead of capture remain unaddressed, risking escalation and accountability.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Cracks in Authority: Surveillance Failures and Erosion of Power
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vosen's perceived control deteriorates as surveillance blind spots, operational failures, and Bourne's counter-infiltration expose the fragility of his authority, transforming him from hunter to hunted.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vosen's surveillance apparatus is shown to be incomplete, undermining his authority and exposing a tactical vulnerability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Vosen is exposed and vulnerable, his location compromised, marking his transition from hunter to hunted.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Vosen cannot determine if Bourne's presence is real or a psychological manipulation, undermining his confidence and operational clarity.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Internal Threat: From External Targets to Institutional Betrayal
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vosen's conflict shifts from external adversaries to internal betrayal as he turns his surveillance apparatus on Deputy Director Landy, suspecting her of collusion with Bourne, revealing deep institutional fractures.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vosen's dominance is destabilized as the arrival of Landy introduces a direct threat to his command.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Vosen experiences a moment of realization and alarm, recognizing that the threat extends beyond Bourne to include compromised loyalty within his own organization.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: The true nature and purpose of the code, as well as the extent of Landy's involvement or betrayal, remain unknown.

cross_scene_arcs.title: The Collapse of Operational Secrecy
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Vosen's efforts to maintain absolute secrecy around Blackbriar unravel as Bourne breaches secure systems, Landy receives coded messages, and the focus shifts from pursuit to defending the facility, signaling systemic exposure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Vosen shifts from containment to active elimination of Daniels, prioritizing operational secrecy over institutional accountability.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: All tactical teams are redirected to converge on the facility in a defensive containment strategy.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether the facility can be secured before Bourne arrives and exposes the program.
